users.title: User Management
users.subtitle: View and manage platform users and their roles.
users.rejectDialogDescription: Provide an optional reason for rejecting {name}'s account request. The user will see this message.

approvalPassword.title: Approval Password
approvalPassword.description: Set an optional password that pending users can enter to approve themselves.
approvalPassword.savedAndCopied: Approval password saved and copied to clipboard.
approvalPassword.clearDialogDescription: Are you sure you want to clear the approval password? Pending users will no longer be able to self-approve.

demoData.title: Demo Data
demoData.subtitle: Generate or remove demo data for testing purposes.

create.title: Create Demo Data
create.description: Generate events, event groups, users, and duty slots with a [DEMO] prefix.

delete.title: Delete Demo Data
delete.description: Remove all demo data from the system.
delete.info: This will delete all entities tagged with [DEMO] — events, event groups, duty slots, bookings, and demo users.

demoData.createSuccess: Created {events} events, {groups} groups, {users} users, {slots} slots, and {bookings} bookings.
demoData.deleteSuccess: Deleted {events} events, {groups} groups, {users} users, {slots} slots, and {bookings} bookings.
